supersedes: cretan-anchor-oneshot-v1 (withdrawn after red-team wf_3bfac2b3-fdf; verdict REVISE_THEN_COMMIT)

hypothesis.H1_generalization: The frozen M2 (fit only on non-Cretan Semitic data) recovers the Cretan LB toponyms at top-1 above the scramble null AND by a positive margin over BOTH a model-free identity/edit-distance baseline and a generic-Egyptian-sign-value ablation.
hypothesis.H1prime_recovery_only: M2 recovers above scramble but NOT above the two model-free baselines -> recovery is skeleton near-identity; NO generalization shown.
hypothesis.H0: Recovery is at the empirical-null rate (assumed true until refuted, invariant 3).

signs_claimed.egyptian_skeleton: m-n-š (leading aleph = vowel-carrier, dropped by f)

hypothesis.cap_note: invariant 5: signal capped at 0.75 downstream and NON-COMPOUNDING; the prior is not the cap.

anchor_selection_rule: skeleton-blind + model-blind: every En-list oval that is (a) Cretan, (b) non-palimpsest, (c) surviving (not lost li14/15), (d) not marked fraglich by Edel -> deterministically {Knossos, Amnisos, Lyktos}
skeletonizer_f: one deterministic hash-pinned function applied identically to Egyptian ovals, target LB, and pool members; aleph/ayin/glides = vowel-carriers dropped on BOTH sides; š and s kept distinct (any merge must be earned by the model); assert f(target_LB)==pool_entry

baselines_and_nulls.B_id: model-free identity / edit-distance / consonant-multiset overlap on skeletons
baselines_and_nulls.B_egy: generic Egyptian sign->consonant table, NO Semitic fitting (ablation isolating the generalization claim)
baselines_and_nulls.test: joint Monte-Carlo permutation, N>=10000: draw scrambled maps, score ALL anchors vs same pool, record r1 per replicate; p=(1+#{r1>=r1_obs})/(1+N)

decision_rule.NO_POWER: M<30 OR any target lacks >=3 distractors within edit-distance<=1
decision_rule.CONFIRM_GENERALIZES: p<0.05 AND r1(M2)>=2 AND r1(M2)>r1(B_id) AND r1(M2)>r1(B_egy); strong claim only at 3/3

corpus_post_holdout.note: skeleton-collision holdout applied (remove pairs whose egy OR foreign skeleton == any target skeleton within Levenshtein 1); exclusion predicate stated

leakage_controls.corpus: exclusion by SKELETON not label; collision holdout -> zero target-skeleton information
leakage_controls.reading_independence: Edel read eroded ovals USING the Greek IDs -> Egyptian skeleton not cleanly independent of the answer; precondition: source Falttafeln 13/14 for sign-level ID-blind readings, else scope claim to 'recovers Edel's readings' with leak documented
leakage_controls.pool: built blind to scores; as_of precedes run (freeze-commit timestamp, fail-closed)

multiple_testing.anchor_rule_deflation: reduction 6->3 by the mechanical rule; deflate for what the rule could admit
multiple_testing.secondary: Phaistos/Kydonia/Kythera + full 6-oval list = SYMMETRIC secondary (a secondary FAIL counts against)

execution.grader: mechanical script; model does not adjudicate (invariant 2)
execution.deviation_policy: any change voids plan_hash -> fresh prereg

firewall: Cretan targets are Egyptian-channel confirmatory targets ONLY; never enter Linear A hypothesis formation or scoring.
preconditions_before_mint: f() written + hash-pinned; f(target_LB)==pool_entry assertion passes
corpus skeleton-collision holdout applied; predicate stated; new sha recorded
pool frozen (one source, confusability floor, uniqueness); sha recorded
Falttafeln 13/14 sourced for reading independence OR claim scoped + leak documented per anchor
no-pilot attestation recorded; freeze committed with timestamp preceding run
plan_hash minted over canonical row incl. all above hashes; then run once
